text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
So like, what kind of costume are you going for this year? Something
easy like a witch? Or something with a bit more "mreeeow," like a
black cat?

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, would you stop it and get back to work already? We're
supposed to be helping!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...In summary, Ritto Dormitory will organize this year's cross-dorm
Halloween party.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The associated procedures will be overseen by me, Mihono Bourbon.
As chief of the party committee, I ask your cooperation.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And me 'n Creek are handlin' the costumes! Hit us up if ya need
anythin'!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
We'll leave a sign-up sheet here, so please fill in your name and
costume idea. The academy staff will do their best to accommodate
your wishes.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oh, also. Bourbon, this is your first time plannin' an event, yeah?
Lemme know if ya got questions.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
At the very least, ya won't be as crazy as Inari. Miho Dorm was in
charge last year and boy, did they make a ruckus...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
All processes are running smoothly. Mission: "Cross-Dorm Halloween
Party," Objective 1: order candy—has been completed.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Likewise, permission to use the fog machine from last year has been
granted. I will deliver it to the technical team upon confirming its
operational status.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh my, Bourbon. You've already done all that?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Yes, though the fog machine does not appear to be functional. I
attempted to turn the device on, but it is not producing f—

text_block_list.name: Fog Machine
text_block_list.text: Beep! Fssssshhh!

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text:
Aaaaah?!
Gwaaaack?!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Cough... Critical error detected. However, the excess water vapor should not have any adverse effects on us. Cough.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: ...We're in for a ride, huh?

And so begin the preparations for this year's cross-dorm Halloween
party, with Mihono Bourbon at the helm.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I've purchased the catering team's order of butter. Next, I need to
procure light bulbs for the technical team. Then, I'll draft the guide
team's shift schedules and reply to the costume team's message...
SPLAT! Crack...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Task: prepare spare jack-o'-lanterns—failed. I will eat the salvageable
pieces of pumpkin...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Next, event overview practice. "Tracen Academy's first Halloween
party started as an event for foreign exchange students. Rather than
strict adherence to tradition, a more fluid approach was taken to
maximize entertainment value."

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Bourbon is being pulled every which way with all these tasks. It really
goes to show how much work a cross-dorm event takes.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I wish I could help somehow, but I don't want to get in her way
and overcomplicate things....

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Rice?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ah, s-sorry. I just... had the same thought...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I don't want to make things worse, but...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Munch, munch...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
(Are those smashed-up pumpkins the ones Bourbon tried to carve
earlier?)

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Total pumpkin remaining—15 kg, 600 g. Rehydration necessary
before further consumption.

text_block_list.name: Ritto Student
text_block_list.text: Um, Bourbon? Do you want us to help eat the leftovers?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
No, please continue with your own routines. I am the one who failed
the pumpkin carving task, so I must take responsibility for the loss
incurred.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Rice, you're blockin' traffic. I'm gonna steal the last carrot
hamburger steak if ya don't hurry.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Wah?! I'm sorry, I'm so sorry! I'm not in line, so um...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
What, ya got business with Bourbon? Quit bein' shy and just ask her
then. C'mon.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
All righty. Hey Bourbon, we're crashin' your table. Rice's got
somethin' she wants to tell ya.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: N-no! I... I just... I only, um...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Aw, quit playin' coy—unless you're tryin' to make this harder. Just ease in with some small talk, yeah? Ask her 'bout the weather.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Okay, uhm... uhhh...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: N-nice weather we're having, huh?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Yes. The sky should be clear all day.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: ...For real? There's bad first dates... and then there's this.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, goodness.
Preparations for the party are going somewhat smoothly. For now, at least.
Later...

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text: AAAAAH!
A shriek pierces the stillness of night...
